message:
test(core): property-based tests for distributed module security and readiness

Adds 27 new proptest + unit tests covering:
- ReadinessItem/ReadinessReport serde roundtrips
- DistributedSecurityError::code() format, stability, and distinctness
- validate_token: matching tokens succeed, mismatched fail, secrets never leak in errors
- Identity-bearing token validation with client identity binding
- evaluate_readiness: aggregate count consistency (required_pass + fail == total), ready flag, determinism, item field completeness
- configured_token_source_kind: single source detection, ambiguous/missing returns None

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
